overview: Temur Leyline Aggro is a fast, creature-heavy Standard deck that leverages U/R/G synergy to flood the board with low-cost threats. By utilizing signature cards like Slickshot Show-Off, Hired Claw, and Elusive Otter, the deck applies immediate pressure while maintaining card advantage and evasion. The game plan revolves around establishing an early board presence, using Leyline synergies to protect or enhance key creatures, and closing out games before opponents can stabilize. Every decision prioritizes speed, board control, and efficient resource usage to outpace midrange and control strategies.
win_conditions: Attacking with a wide board of low-cost creatures like Elusive Otter and Hired Claw to overwhelm life totals.
Using Slickshot Show-Off's abilities to generate value and push lethal damage through evasion or combat tricks.
Leveraging Temur Leyline synergies to protect key threats and accelerate damage output in the late game.

keep_criteria: Hands with two or more one- or two-mana creatures
Combinations featuring Slickshot Show-Off or Hired Claw with early land drops
Draws that include Elusive Otter alongside a removal or Leyline interaction
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking early land drops or creature threats
Draws heavy on three-mana or higher cards without early play
Hands missing Temur mana sources or Leyline synergies

early_game: Play lands and one- or two-mana creatures immediately
Prioritize Elusive Otter and Hired Claw to establish board presence
Use early interaction to protect key threats from opponent's removal
mid_game: Introduce Slickshot Show-Off to generate card advantage and combat tricks
Leverage Leyline effects to pump or shield creatures
Trade efficiently while maintaining a forward board state
late_game: Push lethal with a wide board of evasive and pumped creatures
Use Slickshot Show-Off's value generation to outlast opponent's resources
Commit to all-in attacks when opponent lacks board control or sweepers

key_cards.name: Slickshot Show-Off
key_cards.role: Value engine and combat trick generator
key_cards.notes: Deploy on turn three to generate card advantage and enable surprise damage pushes. Use its abilities to bypass blockers or trigger Leyline synergies.

key_cards.name: Hired Claw
key_cards.role: Early board presence and aggressive threat
key_cards.notes: Play on turn two to apply immediate pressure. Pair with Leyline buffs to make it a difficult early blocker or attacker.

key_cards.name: Elusive Otter
key_cards.role: Evasive early threat and tempo piece
key_cards.notes: Cast on turn one or two to establish an early board presence. Use its evasion to slip past blockers and secure early damage while developing your Leyline game plan.

sequencing_tips: Play Elusive Otter or Hired Claw before activating Leyline effects to maximize combat damage.
Hold up mana for Slickshot Show-Off's abilities when opponents are likely to cast removal or sweepers.
Prioritize land drops in the early game to ensure smooth casting of signature creatures.
Use Leyline synergies to protect key threats only when the opponent has visible interaction.

matchups.advice: Play aggressively early and use Slickshot Show-Off to generate value before they stabilize. Push damage through evasion to bypass counterspells.
Establish a wide board with Elusive Otter and Hired Claw to pressure their life total before they can develop their own threats. Trade efficiently to keep the board open.
Use Leyline synergies to pump your creatures and match their speed. Prioritize blocking with Hired Claw and Elusive Otter while looking for lethal with Slickshot Show-Off.

common_threats: Early board wipes that clear your creature-heavy board
Targeted removal aimed at Slickshot Show-Off or Hired Claw
Counterspells disrupting your Leyline synergies and key creatures
Resilient midrange creatures that outvalue your early pressure
